examples.docs:
Fired when a new user is created. Inherits the document-level HMAC-SHA256
signature verification configuration.

webhooks_.docs:
Fired when a new user is created. Inherits the document-level HMAC-SHA256
signature verification configuration.

examples.docs:
Fired when an order is completed. Inherits the document-level HMAC-SHA256
signature verification configuration.

webhooks_.docs:
Fired when an order is completed. Inherits the document-level HMAC-SHA256
signature verification configuration.

examples.docs:
Fired when a payment status changes. Uses asymmetric RSA-SHA256 signature
verification with keys fetched from a JWKS endpoint, overriding the
document-level default.

webhooks_.docs:
Fired when a payment status changes. Uses asymmetric RSA-SHA256 signature
verification with keys fetched from a JWKS endpoint, overriding the
document-level default.

examples.docs:
Fired when a refund is processed. Uses asymmetric ECDSA-SHA256 signature
verification with a static public key, overriding the document-level default.

webhooks_.docs:
Fired when a refund is processed. Uses asymmetric ECDSA-SHA256 signature
verification with a static public key, overriding the document-level default.
